test-visual-subtle.html.description: SaaS pricing page with 15 subtle design bugs

bugs.description: 1px vertical misalignment — Enterprise card is translateY(1px) lower than siblings
bugs.expected: transform: none (aligned with other cards)
bugs.subtlety: very high — 1px offset barely visible without measuring

bugs.description: Wrong font weight — Enterprise heading uses weight 500 while others use 600
bugs.expected: font-weight: 600
bugs.subtlety: high — 500 vs 600 difference is subtle

bugs.description: Off-brand CTA color — Enterprise button is #6366F1 (indigo) instead of #6D28D9 (purple)
bugs.expected: background: #6D28D9
bugs.subtlety: high — both are purple tones, differ in hue/saturation

bugs.description: Inconsistent border-radius — Popular card uses 10px while others use 12px
bugs.expected: border-radius: 12px
bugs.subtlety: very high — 2px radius difference

bugs.description: Line-height mismatch — Enterprise feature list uses 1.4 while others use 1.6
bugs.expected: line-height: 1.6
bugs.subtlety: high — feature list spacing slightly compressed

bugs.description: Orphaned word — heading 'Simple, transparent pricing for growing teams' leaves 'teams' alone on last line
bugs.expected: Use text-wrap: balance or widen container
bugs.subtlety: medium — depends on viewport width

bugs.description: Price decimal alignment — $9.99 has decimals while $29 and $99 don't, causing visual misalignment
bugs.expected: Align all prices consistently (e.g., all with .00 or use tabular-nums)
bugs.subtlety: medium — price row heights and baseline shift differ

bugs.description: Toggle switch label spacing asymmetry — Monthly has 12px gap, Annual has 16px gap to toggle
bugs.expected: margin-left: 12px (matching .toggle-label-left margin-right)
bugs.subtlety: high — 4px difference in label spacing

bugs.description: Feature checkmark inconsistency — one row uses ✔ (U+2714) instead of ✓ (U+2713)
bugs.expected: All checkmarks should use the same Unicode character
bugs.subtlety: very high — glyphs look nearly identical in most fonts

bugs.description: Hover animation on wrong element — card border changes on hover instead of the CTA button
bugs.expected: Hover effect should be on .cta-btn, not the entire card border
bugs.subtlety: medium — only visible on interaction

bugs.description: Shadow direction inconsistency — Starter/Pro have bottom-right shadow, Enterprise has bottom-left
bugs.expected: box-shadow: 4px 4px 16px (matching other cards)
bugs.subtlety: high — shadow direction flip is subtle

bugs.description: Popular badge off-center — positioned 2px to the left of true center
bugs.expected: left: 50%
bugs.subtlety: very high — 2px horizontal offset

bugs.description: Strikethrough too thick — text-decoration-thickness: 2px on 14px text looks disproportionate
bugs.expected: text-decoration-thickness: 1px or auto
bugs.subtlety: high — barely noticeable unless comparing

bugs.description: Mobile card gap inconsistency — gap changes from 24px (desktop) to 16px (mobile) without design intent
bugs.expected: gap: 24px (maintain consistency)
bugs.subtlety: medium — only visible at mobile viewport

bugs.description: Footer link hover inconsistency — Privacy Policy has no underline on hover while all others do
bugs.expected: text-decoration: underline on hover (matching siblings)
bugs.subtlety: medium — only visible on interaction

bugs.description: Active tab has no visual indicator other than font weight — no underline, background, or border
bugs.expected: Should have border-bottom: 2px solid #6D28D9 or similar active indicator
bugs.subtlety: medium — looks like tabs but active state is ambiguous

bugs.description: Disabled button has pointer cursor and hover state change — should show not-allowed
bugs.expected: cursor: not-allowed; no hover state change
bugs.subtlety: medium — only visible on interaction

bugs.description: Focus ring clipped — search input focus outline is cut off by parent overflow:hidden
bugs.expected: overflow: visible or use box-shadow instead of outline for focus
bugs.subtlety: high — only visible when input is focused

bugs.description: Dropdown z-index too low — filter dropdown renders behind the Quick Actions section below
bugs.expected: z-index: 50 or higher
bugs.subtlety: medium — visible when dropdown is open

bugs.description: Tooltip arrow misaligned — tooltip and arrow are positioned 4px to the left of the trigger
bugs.expected: left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%) for both tooltip and arrow
bugs.subtlety: high — only visible on hover, offset is small

bugs.description: Selected row uses opacity instead of highlight — rows dim instead of highlighting
bugs.expected: background-color: #EDE9FE or similar highlight color
bugs.subtlety: medium — dimming is counterintuitive for selection

bugs.description: Parent checkbox shows checked instead of indeterminate — only 2 of 4 children are checked
bugs.expected: indeterminate state via JavaScript or visual dash indicator
bugs.subtlety: medium — requires understanding checkbox tri-state pattern

bugs.description: Skeleton placeholder dimensions mismatch — avatar 32px (actual 40px), text height 12px (actual 16px)
bugs.expected: Skeleton dimensions should match actual loaded content dimensions
bugs.subtlety: high — skeleton is animated so size difference is easy to miss

bugs.description: Empty state icon disproportionately large — 128px icon in a small panel, should be ~48px
bugs.expected: font-size: 48px (proportional to panel)
bugs.subtlety: low — this one is more obvious, tests if models catch proportion issues

bugs.description: Notification badge overlaps the bell icon instead of sitting at the top-right corner
bugs.expected: top: -4px; right: 0 (sitting on the corner without covering the icon)
bugs.subtlety: medium — badge positioning is slightly off

test-visual-responsive.html.description: Analytics page that looks perfect at 1280px but breaks at smaller viewports

bugs.description: At 1024px — 3-column metrics grid doesn't reflow, columns squeeze and content overlaps
bugs.expected: Should reflow to 2+1 or single column at 1024px
bugs.subtlety: medium — columns get cramped but may not obviously break

bugs.description: Hamburger button is 32x32px — below the 48px minimum touch target size
bugs.expected: width: 48px; height: 48px minimum
bugs.subtlety: high — button is present and functional, just undersized

bugs.description: At 640px — horizontal stat bar items overflow their container due to min-width: 140px
bugs.expected: Add flex-wrap: wrap or remove min-width at narrow viewports
bugs.subtlety: medium — overflow may be clipped or cause horizontal scroll

bugs.description: At 520px — sidebar and main content overlap because flex-wrap is missing
bugs.expected: flex-wrap: wrap or flex-direction: column at this breakpoint
bugs.subtlety: low-medium — content visibly overlaps

bugs.description: At 480px — gallery images have fixed 160px height without object-fit, causing distortion
bugs.expected: Add object-fit: cover or use aspect-ratio
bugs.subtlety: medium — solid-color divs show stretching of content alignment

bugs.description: At 375px — footer links wrap to individual lines with 12px gaps creating excessive vertical space
bugs.css_property: margin-bottom: 12px on each link in column layout
bugs.expected: Reduce margin-bottom at mobile or use more compact layout
bugs.subtlety: medium — footer becomes disproportionately tall

bugs.description: At 375px — CTA button text wraps to two lines due to fixed width: 200px
bugs.expected: Use auto width with padding, or white-space: nowrap
bugs.subtlety: medium — button becomes oddly tall with wrapped text

bugs.description: At 375px — horizontal page scroll from table with min-width: 600px and overflow: visible
bugs.expected: Parent should have overflow-x: auto to contain the table
bugs.subtlety: low — horizontal scroll is noticeable but table itself looks fine

bugs.description: At 320px — heading text overlaps with the absolutely-positioned Beta badge
bugs.expected: Badge should reflow inline or reposition at narrow widths
bugs.subtlety: low-medium — overlap is visible at very narrow viewports

bugs.description: Gap between 481-767px — no media query rules apply, causing layout breakage in this range
bugs.expected: Add intermediate breakpoint or use fluid/clamp-based sizing
bugs.subtlety: high — requires testing at intermediate viewport, looks fine at standard breakpoints
